privileged_info_summary: The task hr_performance_calibration@1 operates on a synthetic Odoo Calendar environment where all data is created programmatically. Frank Rivera is established as an HR Business Partner at Northbridge (setup_data.py line 45). The required attendees are Grace Patel (CFO, setup_data.py line 46) and Henry Kim (VP Operations, setup_data.py line 47), all of which are pre-created contacts in the environment. The task requires creating a monthly recurring event titled 'Performance Review Calibration' with these three attendees, writing an agenda description, and deleting the pre-existing 'Annual Performance Review - Frank Rivera' event. The pass threshold is 70 out of 100 points, as confirmed in both verifier.py and README.md. All metadata values are consistent with the task requirements documented in task.json and the synthetic data setup in scripts/setup_data.py.
